name: Find
description: Find files and directories by name using fd, with optional fuzzy matching via fzf

preferences.name: Alt+Enter action
preferences.description: What happens when you press Alt+Enter on a result.

preferences.name: Base directory
preferences.description: Where to search from. Comma-separated for multiple locations, e.g. '~,/mnt/data'. Use '/' to search everywhere (slow: walks /proc, /sys, /usr etc).

preferences.name: Result limit
preferences.description: Maximum number of results to show.

preferences.name: Include hidden files
preferences.description: Search hidden files and directories (names starting with a dot).

preferences.name: Ignore file
preferences.description: Path to a .gitignore-style file listing paths to skip.

preferences.name: Terminal command
preferences.description: Terminal emulator for 'Open in terminal'. Leave blank to auto-detect. For an unsupported terminal, supply a full command with {} as the directory, e.g. 'myterm --cd {}'.
